scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @qyou/types && npm run build --workspace @qyou/config && npm run build --workspace @qyou/api && npm run build --workspace @qyou/stellar-service && npm run build --workspace @qyou/web
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile" "npm run dev:stellar-service"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @qyou/types && npm run typecheck --workspace @qyou/config && npm run typecheck --workspace @qyou/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @qyou/stellar-service && npm run typecheck --workspace @qyou/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @qyou/mobile
